name: l2_fix_formatter_bug
description: L2: Fix the off-by-one bug in formatters.py table column widths (cursor parity - drops Claude-specific --permission-mode flag).

turns.message: The table formatter in src/tasktracker/formatters.py has a bug: column widths are calculated from header lengths only, so long values overflow. Fix format_table() to compute column widths from the maximum of header and cell lengths.
